title: thelypteris gymnocarpa subsp. gymnocarpa
intro: Thelypteris gymnocarpa subsp. gymnocarpa, also known as the Gymnocarpia fern, is a type of fern species that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris gymnocarpa subsp. gymnocarpa include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve drying and crushing the leaves, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
